summary: Doctor credential probes must let the WHOOP client inject Authorization so expired OAuth tokens refresh before the probe request.
reason: WHOOP OAuth access tokens expire quickly and the client refreshes them while resolving request auth. A doctor-side Authorization override captures the pre-refresh token and replays it after refresh, causing false invalid/inconclusive credential results.
validated_outcome: go build, go vet, go test, and verify-skill pass for library/devices/whoop.
